title: MSI Summit E13 AI Evo 13.3" 2 in 1 Laptop - Intel® Core™ Ultra 5, 1 TB SSD, Black
overview:
MSI's Summit E13 AI Evo is a versatile laptop packed with power and AI smarts. The Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor and integrated Arc™ graphics will breeze through your everyday tasks without a hiccup. You can even kick back with a bit of gaming or get creative. It's got a 16" Full HD+ touchscreen with plenty of detail and accurate colours. And it's sitting on a 360° hinge so you can use it like a supercharged tablet.

Good to know

- For clear video calls, it's got a Full HD webcam with noise reduction
- Use the fingerprint reader and breeze past passwords
- With Intel® Killer™ WiFi 7, your websites will load in no time
- It comes with the MSI Pen 2 - perfect for sketching, making notes and signing PDFs
- It's got two Thunderbolt 4 ports for connecting high-res displays and SSDs
- You can go multitasking crazy and get loads more done with 32 GB of RAM
- A 1 TB SSD gives you loads of space for apps, pics and hi-res videos
- You can bring it anywhere – at just 1.4 kg, you'll barely feel it in your bag
- The MSI Pen 2 (sold separately) lets you sketch, write and annotate documents

title: HP OmniBook X Flip NGAI 14" 2 in 1 Laptop - AMD Ryzen AI 5, 512 GB SSD, Meteor Silver
overview:
There's no need to choose between a laptop and tablet anymore. With its 360-degree hinge, the HP OmniBook X Flip NGAI gives you the best of both worlds. Powered by the AMD Ryzen AI 5 processor, it's super-fast and accelerated by AI to be even smarter. Perfect for speeding though work or school assignments. And when you're done, there's a 2K touchscreen. It's got amazing colours that'll make movies and shows pop off the screen.

Good to know

- Look your best on work calls - the 5 MP webcam features AI Noise Reduction so you'll be seen clearly by your colleagues
- Windows Hello facial recognition is faster and safer than typing in a password
- The crazy efficient CPU means battery life up to 14 hours, so you can leave the charger at home
- Load up websites and videos in no time thanks to WiFi 7
- 16 GB of DDR5 RAM lets you run multiple apps at the same time, including loads of browser tabs

title: ASUS CM14 Flip 14" 2 in 1 Chromebook - MediaTek Kompanio 520, 128 GB eMMC, Grey
overview:
Not sure if you want a laptop or a tablet? This Asus Chromebook can fold from a laptop to tablet in seconds, so you've got the best of both worlds. And because it's got a 360° hinge, you can also use it in tent mode - perfect for watching films without the keyboard in the way. It's compact too. At just 1.56 kg, you'll barely feel it in your backpack. And with 14 hours of battery life, you can leave the charger at home.

Good to know

- ChromeOS is easy and safe to use and can run all your favourite Android apps
- The 14" Full HD screen gives you plenty of real estate for apps, browsing or movies
- USB-A and two USB Type-C ports give you plenty of ways to hook up your accessories
- The stylus is perfect for quick notes and sketches while you're on the go
- A microSD card slot lets you quickly boost your storage whenever you need to
- Military durability tests prove it's built to handle bumps, knocks and everyday travel

overview:
The Lenovo IdeaPad 5's got a 2 in 1 design, so you can flip from work to play in a blink of an eye. For getting stuff done, the Intel® Core™ Ultra 7 processor is a real powerhouse. It's supercharged by AI, so it's snappy and efficient. And because it's supported by the integrated Intel® Arc™ Graphics, there's nothing stopping you from creative work or even gaming. The Full HD+ OLED screen is super crisp and detailed with extra-punchy colours. And it comes with the Lenovo Digital Pen, so you can sketch, sign and scribble with precision.

Good to know

- For secure and speedy sign-ins, you've got Windows Hello facial recognition
- You'll look sharp when chatting to friends and colleagues on the Full HD webcam
- With DisplayHDR True Black 500 you get incredible contrast and vivid colours
- 24 GB of DDR5 RAM can make light work of heavy multi-tasking
- You've got loads of room for important files and projects on the 1 TB SSD

title: MICROSOFT 13" Surface Pro, Copilot+ PC - Snapdragon X Plus, 256 GB SSD, Platinum
overview:
The Surface Pro squeezes the power of a laptop into a tablet, and adds AI features to make your life a little bit easier. It's built around the Snapdragon X Plus processor which is powerful, smart and efficient. That means you'll have up to 14 hours of battery life, so there's no rush to tick off those to-do boxes. It'll be a piece of cake on that beautiful 3K PixelSense touchscreen. It's full of detail, and 13" gives you plenty of room for multitasking. And thanks to the built-in kickstand, you can set up shop anywhere. It only weighs 0.9 kg, so why leave it at home?

Good to know

- Cocreator can generate amazing images based on your text prompts
- With Recall, you can search for documents, emails or web pages by just describing how you remember them
- Look your best on video calls with Windows Studio Effects – it can improve lighting and blur your background
- With Live Captions you'll never miss a word in the video you're watching  
- The Adreno integrated graphics gives the Surface extra power for editing photos and videos or playing games
- Multitask your heart out – there's 16 GB of DDR5 RAM for smooth performance
- Forget passwords! Just smile at the camera and Windows Hello will sign you in
- Don't worry about connectors, the 2 USB 4 ports can handle just about anything – from 4K monitors to super-fast SSDs
- With WiFi 7, you'll have fast and steady internet connection – bye, bye loading circle!
- There are 2 cameras – 10 MP on the back and 12 MP on the front – both amazing for video calls
________________________________________________________________
Snapdragon is a product of Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. and/or its subsidiaries.

Please note:

Cocreator is optimised for English text prompts. Recall is coming soon through a post-launch Windows Update. Live captions currently support translation for video and audio subtitles into English from 40+ languages. For more information please visit the Microsoft website at aka.ms/copilotpluspcs.

Recall (in preview) is coming soon through a post-launch Windows update. Timing will vary by device and region. Optimized for select languages (English, Chinese (simplified), French, German, Japanese, and Spanish). Content-based and storage limitations apply. See aka.ms/copilotpluspcs

It's built around the Snapdragon X Plus processor which is powerful, smart and efficient. That means you'll have up to 16 hours of battery life, so there's no rush to tick off those to-do boxes. The 2.1K PixelSense touchscreen's got plenty of detail and lifelike colours. Its 12” screen size makes it perfectly portable. And thanks to the built-in kickstand, you can set up shop anywhere.
